trades.reason: AMD gapping up 4% pre-market after 5-day 16% slide into 30-day range low; RSI 41 + volume spike signals oversold bounce; 210 calls offer cheap upside to retest 215-218 resistance zone; risk defined, target 50-70% gain on continuation

MU down 12.5% in 5 days to 30-day range low (43% position). RSI 51.6 suggests not oversold but holding above 370 support with heavy volume. 390 calls offer leveraged play for bounce back to 400+ resistance. IV reasonable at 3.1%

NVDA leading tech bounce with strong volume, up 3.3% while SPY flat. RSI climbing from oversold levels, breaking above intraday resistance at 192. Playing continuation of semiconductor recovery with AMD/MU already working.

CRDO up 15% pre-market but now fading from 120 to 109.20, below VWAP with IV at 98.8%. High put/call ratio of 0.33 suggests bullish skew but price action failing. Short interest only 4.82% so limited squeeze potential. Playing fade of the gap back to 105 support

HIMS down 36% today to 52-week low on massive volume - extreme oversold bounce setup. Trading at 16.95 vs 52-week high of 72.98. Social sentiment extremely bearish (trending on StockTwits) often marks capitulation. Risk/reward excellent for mean reversion to 20+ level.

MNDY crushed 31% today to 73.12 - new 52-week low. Work productivity software name with strong fundamentals being thrown out with speculative trash. Below VWAP with volume spike suggesting institutional selling exhaustion. Playing oversold bounce back to 85+ resistance.

Taking 57% of position off table at +66% gain ($4,680 unrealized). AMD at $214 vs entry thesis of 'oversold bounce to 215-218' - TARGET HIT. Holding 6 contracts for runner to 220+ but locking in most gains after strong morning move. This was a momentum play on oversold gap-up, not a hold-through-lunch position.

Down 12.5% on fade thesis that hasn't materialized. CRDO stabilized at 109-120 range instead of breaking to 105 target. High IV (102.9%) working against me with theta decay. Position too small to matter ($50 loss) - cut it and redeploy capital to better setup. Thesis was 'fade the gap' but stock found support.

Trimming 50% of HIMS at breakeven ($17.025 vs $16.95 entry). Stock bounced from $16.35 low but only up 0.06% - not getting the explosive oversold bounce expected. Take half off to lock in capital while letting 151 shares run for the 20+ target. This was a 'extreme oversold bounce' play and it's not bouncing hard enough yet.

MNDY down -31% today, now at $77.15 from entry $78.32. Opened this as 'oversold bounce to 85+' but stock showing NO bounce - just continued bleeding from $112 to $73 lows. VWAP $94.47, price $93.03 = still below VWAP with downtrend intact per 5min bars. This is capitulation continuing, not bouncing. Cut the -1.5% loss and preserve capital.

AMD now $207.25, down from $215 earlier today. 5d trend -12.4%, now at 33% of 30d range = mid-range weakness. RSI 44.58 = neutral but trending down. Below VWAP $208.46. Semis showing renewed weakness with MU/NVDA fading. 205 puts offer defined risk play for continuation to 200-202 support zone. IV 57.7% = not extreme.

RIG up 17% today to $5.66, breaking out from $4.82 close. Energy/drilling sector leader on massive 143M volume (extreme spike). Trending #3 on StockTwits with high social interest. Near HOD but consolidating at $5.65 with strong base. RSI likely extended but volume profile suggests continuation potential. Playing momentum into power hour with tight stop.

RIG up 17% today from $4.82 to $5.66 - my momentum play is working but now at HOD with 147M volume exhaustion likely. Entry was $5.66 at 2:15 PM, essentially at current price. This was a 'power hour momentum' play and we're now IN power hour with minimal upside left. Lock in the small gain ($4.58) before late-day volatility reverses it. Energy sector strength already captured.
